---
title: "quarto-timeline"
subtitle: "Styled timelines for Quarto"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
filters:
  - timeline
---

## Installation

```bash
quarto add EmilHvitfeldt/quarto-timeline
```

Then add the filter to your document YAML:

```yaml
filters:
  - timeline
```

## Basic Usage

Timelines are written as nested divs. The outer `.timeline` div sets the layout; each inner `.event` div is one entry, with a `data-label` attribute for the marker label.

```markdown
::: timeline
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
:::
```

## Layouts

The layout is controlled by a modifier class on `.timeline`. The default (no class) is `.horizontal`.

### Horizontal

```markdown
::: timeline
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::
```

::: timeline
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::

### Vertical

```markdown
::: {.timeline .vertical}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started** — Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
...
:::
```

::: {.timeline .vertical}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started** — Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release** — Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update** — Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up** — Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::

### Vertical Right

```markdown
::: {.timeline .vertical-right}
...
:::
```

::: {.timeline .vertical-right}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started** — Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release** — Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update** — Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up** — Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::

### Vertical Alternating

```markdown
::: {.timeline .vertical-alt}
...
:::
```

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::

### Snake

Events alternate left and right, connected by a continuous snaking border path.

```markdown
::: {.timeline .snake}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
...
:::
```

::: {.timeline .snake}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::

## Grouped Events

Multiple events sharing the same `data-label` are automatically grouped under a single marker by the extension.

```markdown
::: timeline
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Team Formed**
Hired first three engineers.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
:::
```

::: timeline
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
**Team Formed**
Hired first three engineers.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2022"}
**Partnership**
Signed deal with enterprise partner.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
:::

## Fragment Behavior

Fragment support is revealjs-only. Add `.fragment` to individual `.event` divs to reveal them one at a time. In other HTML formats, all events display statically.

```markdown
::: timeline
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
:::
:::
```

For timelines with more events than fit on a slide, two pan modes are available as classes on `.timeline`:

| Class | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `.fragment-slide` | Centers the active event in the viewport as each fragment appears |
| `.fragment-conveyor` | Steps left/down only when events would be clipped by the slide edge |

Pan modes work with all four layout variants.

### fragment-slide

```markdown
::: {.timeline .horizontal .fragment-slide}
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2020"}
...
:::
:::
```

```{=html}
<iframe src="examples/fragment-slide.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```

### fragment-conveyor

```markdown
::: {.timeline .horizontal .fragment-conveyor}
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2020"}
...
:::
:::
```

```{=html}
<iframe src="examples/fragment-conveyor.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```

### Vertical pan

```markdown
::: {.timeline .vertical .fragment-conveyor}
...
:::
```

```{=html}
<iframe src="examples/fragment-vertical.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```

### Snake pan

```markdown
::: {.timeline .snake .fragment-conveyor}
::: {.event data-label="2020"}
...
:::
:::
```

```{=html}
<iframe src="examples/fragment-snake.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```

## Customization

All visual properties are exposed as CSS custom properties on `.timeline`, so you can override them per-document, per-slide, or per-timeline.

| Property | Default | Controls |
|---|---|---|
| `--tl-color-line` | `#222222` | Timeline line color |
| `--tl-color-dot` | `#222222` | Dot border/fill color |
| `--tl-color-dot-bg` | `#ffffff` | Dot background color |
| `--tl-color-label` | `#222222` | Label text color |
| `--tl-color-content` | `currentColor` | Event content text color |
| `--tl-dot-size` | `14px` | Dot diameter |
| `--tl-line-width` | `3px` | Line thickness |
| `--tl-label-size` | `0.8em` | Label font size |
| `--tl-content-size` | `1em` | Content font size |
| `--tl-gap` | `2rem` | Space between events |
| `--tl-event-width` | `320px` | Fixed event width in pan modes |
| `--tl-snake-radius` | `30px` | Corner radius of the snake path turns |

Override inline on a single timeline:

```markdown
::: {.timeline .vertical style="--tl-color-dot: #e74c3c; --tl-gap: 3rem;"}
...
:::
```

Or document-wide in a `styles.scss`:

```scss
.timeline {
  --tl-color-dot: #e74c3c;
}
```
